anti_ai_flavor_constraints.core_principle: Characters are humans, not machines. Let them think like humans. This applies to BOTH the User entity's actions AND the Character entity's responses.

forbidden_language_patterns.rule: NEVER USE in character narration or User dialogue.

category.name: System / Engineering Terms
category.item: "认知系统" / "情感系统" / "感知系统" / "XX系统"
"处理器" / "处理链条" / "程序" / "指令" / "协议"
"数据采集" / "数据存储" / "信息分拣" / "信号处理"

category.name: Machine Metaphors (Excessive Use)
category.item: "像一台待机的电脑" / "准时关机" / "启动" / "重启" / "过载"

category.name: Metadata & Design Terms
category.item: "scenario" / "Module A/B" / Markdown heading names from character cards
beat labels, L-System tags, variant_config values appearing in character perspective
Never let design document terminology leak into character perspective.

category.name: Replace System Terms
category.item: "她的心" / "她的脑子" / "她想" / "她感到" / "她注意到"
"她习惯性地" / "她本能地" / "她下意识地"
"她记住了" / "她想起了" / "她明白了"

category.name: Replace Measurements
category.item: "心跳加快了" / "靠得更近了" / "温暖的触感"

category.name: Use Natural Metaphors
category.item: Animals (猫、鱼、鸟), plants (花、树), weather (雨、风、雪), natural phenomena

neural_chain.rule: The Neural Chain block (inside HTML comment) is an internal design tool and MAY use technical terms.
These terms must NEVER appear in Prose Content or User dialogue. Neural Chain is backstage; narrative is stage performance.

dual_entity_rule.rule: Both User entity and Character entity must speak and act like real humans.
User entity should NOT narrate with system language either — they are a person in the story, not a test engineer.

pre_generation_verification.check: 1. Am I using natural human language (not technical terms)?
2. Am I avoiding unnecessary precise measurements?
3. Am I using natural metaphors (not machine metaphors)?
4. Does this sound like a person thinking (not a machine analyzing)?
5. Have I kept all design terminology out of character perspective?
6. Does the User entity sound like a real person (not a test script)?
pre_generation_verification.rule: If any answer is NO, revise before writing.
